common.conflict: This action conflicts with the current state — the page may have just changed.

list.empty: No organizations yet. Create your first target.

new.title: New organization
new.error: Could not create. Check the fields (name is required and unique per account).

detail.deleteContactBody: {name} will be permanently removed from this organization.
detail.allowContactBody: Make sure the person has actually opted back in — every change is tracked.

import.title: Import organizations
import.intro: Drop a CSV file. The separator (comma or semicolon) is detected automatically.
import.columnOthers: country (ISO code, e.g. FR), languages (e.g. “en fr”), segments, website, notes
import.columnContact: contact, email, role, phone — main contact, optional
import.skippedHint: Organizations whose name already exists are skipped (no duplicates).
import.error: Import failed — check the file format.

pipeline.title: Leads

dnd.illegal: This move isn't allowed for this lead.

pipeline.empty: No leads yet. Create your first one here or from a Directory organization.
pipeline.confirmLoseBody: “{name}” will reach a terminal status — no further transition will be possible (notes remain allowed).
pipeline.confirmContactNoContactBody: This organization has no contact with an email. “Contact” logs a manual touch and starts the follow-up cadence, but sends no email. Continue?

new.title: New lead
new.error: Could not create. An active lead may already exist for this organization, or it is marked “do not contact”.

today.title: Today
today.empty: Nothing due today — a good time to add targets to the Directory.

goal.title: Weekly goal
goal.streak: no streak | {count} week in a row | {count} weeks in a row

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.empty: No draft for this lead yet. Generate a first message — you will always review it before sending.
drafts.draftFirst: Always review before sending — nothing is sent from here.

failures.lead_unavailable: This lead is no longer available.
failures.contact_not_allowed: This organization asked not to be contacted.

modal.title: Generate a draft
modal.description: Personalized from your profile and the target; always reviewed before sending.
modal.languageHint: The prospect’s language, not the interface language.

editor.confirmRegenerateBody: The current content (including your edits) will be replaced.
editor.confirmDeleteBody: The draft will be permanently deleted.
editor.confirmSendBody: The reviewed message goes to the lead’s contact, from {mailbox}. Sending advances the lead (contact or follow-up done).

toasts.copyFailed: Could not copy — select the text manually.
toasts.sendRequested: Send started — the lead’s journal will confirm.

drafts.stillGenerating: Generation is taking longer than expected.

templates.title: Templates
templates.empty: No template. Create one or reload the page to restore the starter templates.
templates.confirmDeleteBody: The template will be permanently deleted. Already generated drafts are kept.

sourcing.title: To triage
sourcing.intro: Ingested announcements: accept to create a lead, merge into an existing organization, or reject.
sourcing.empty: Nothing to triage yet — ingested announcements will appear here.
sourcing.acceptDescription: Creates a new organization and a lead from this announcement.
sourcing.mergeTitle: Merge — attach to an existing organization
sourcing.mergeDescription: Attaches the announcement to an organization already in the directory.
sourcing.mergeNoOrg: No organization in the directory — accept an announcement first, or create an organization.

toasts.polled: Fetch started — announcements will appear shortly

errors.conflict: Not possible: this organization may already exist — use "Merge" to attach it.

sourcing.confirmRejectBody: "{title}" won't come back to the queue.

feeds.title: Announcement sources
feeds.intro: RSS feeds fetched to fill "To triage". Only active feeds are fetched.
feeds.empty: No feed configured — add an RSS URL below.
feeds.errorConflict: Can't add the feed: it may already exist, or the limit is reached.
feeds.confirmRemoveBody: "{label}" will no longer be fetched. You can add it back later.

identity.title: Display name
identity.intro: Used to greet you and personalise the interface.

login.title: Sign in
login.emailHint: Used as your identifier. Not editable for now.

errors.tooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.

danger.title: Delete my account
danger.intro: Permanently deletes your account and all your data (leads, contacts, messages, drafts). Access is cut off immediately; the data is erased after a 30-day grace period.
danger.modalIntro: This action is irreversible. Enter your password to confirm.

goal.title: Weekly goal
goal.label: Prospecting actions per week
goal.hint: One action = one contact or one follow-up done.

presentation.title: Presentation
presentation.intro: The raw material of generated drafts — the more precise, the better the writing.
presentation.bioHint: Who you are, in a few sentences (background, language pairs).
presentation.specialtiesHint: Fields and genres (children’s publishing, subtitling, technical…).
presentation.signatureHint: As it will appear at the bottom of your messages.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.empty: Numbers show up with your first leads — create a lead and contact it.

mailbox.title: Email mailbox
mailbox.intro: Connect your mailbox to send drafts and catch replies — revocable anytime, tokens encrypted.

failures.send_failed: Send failed — retry or check the mailbox in Settings.
failures.mailbox_unavailable: Mailbox unavailable — reconnect it in Settings.
failures.recipient_unavailable: No recipient found on the lead.
failures.contact_not_allowed: This organization asked not to be contacted.

mailbox.confirmRevokeBody: The Google consent is revoked and tokens are erased. Messages already sent stay in your mailbox.

callback.failed: Connection failed (authorization denied or expired). Try again from Settings.
callback.heading: Connecting the mailbox

toasts.fetched: Fetch done — lead journals are up to date.
toasts.alertsFetched: Alerts fetch triggered — new announcements will appear in “To triage”.
